title: sciuris officinalis
intro: Sciuris officinalis, also known as Scurvy Grass or Cockscomb, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural source of vitamin C, which helps to prevent scurvy and boost the immune system. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Sciuris officinalis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
